Phase-26.NAME: Stabilization Gates and Operator Handoff
Phase-26.goal: Close the improvement wave with explicit verification gates, operator handoff, and a clear record of local versus live evidence.

scope.included: Verification matrix, MyGRACE refresh, UI/mobile smoke reports, DR dry-run status, and operator handoff notes.
scope.excluded: New product features beyond the planned cleanup, recovery, UI, and session hardening work.

Phase-26.step-1: Run MyGRACE integrity review and ensure indexes, per-module files, per-phase files, and verification files are synchronized.
Phase-26.step-2: Record disaster recovery dry-run status, blocked live checks, backup manifest shape, and restore evidence expectations.
Phase-26.step-3: Record mobile UI verification evidence for user and admin frontends, including viewport coverage and unresolved UX issues.
Phase-26.step-4: Record auth/session smoke evidence and any remaining compatibility risks.
Phase-26.step-5: Produce final operator handoff: what changed, how to verify, how to recover, and what must not be touched without approval.

verification.check-1: All planned verification entries have pass, pending, blocked, or live-required evidence status.
verification.check-2: Operator handoff states that deploy/install scripts were not modified by this wave.
verification.check-3: Known residual risks are documented with next recommended phase.

outcome.result-1: Created docs/handoff/STABILIZATION-PHASE-26.xml with verification matrix, operator handoff, protected surfaces, and remaining live-required gates.
outcome.result-2: Recorded Phase-22 as blocked-live and Phase-23/24/25 as locally verified with explicit evidence links.
outcome.result-3: Confirmed deploy/install surfaces are out of scope and must remain unchanged without explicit operator approval.
